validation: VAL-006 reports and CSV export browser validation
steps: Seeded a Postgres-backed timetable, published session, approved leave, and substitute offer through API routes.
Opened the Vite app in a real browser.
Clicked Load reports in the Reports panel.
Verified workload, leave summary, substitute history, and coverage operations data appeared in the browser snapshot.
Clicked workload Export CSV and downloaded workload.csv.
residualRisk: Browser validation covers workload CSV export; API/component tests cover leave-summary, substitute-history, and coverage-operations CSV/export paths.
